script: for B in aixa alejandro emily-claude gabriel heather kaye david rosi stephanie-claude zahid yooai neil-claude; do F=/home/azureuser/${B}-responder.py; if [ ! -f $F ]; then echo "$B: no responder file (skip)"; continue; fi; AAD=$(grep -E '^(USER_AAD_ID|ROSI_AAD_ID|AIXA_AAD_ID|YOO_AAD_ID|GABRIEL_AAD_ID|EMILY_AAD_ID)' $F | grep -oE '"[0-9a-f-]{36}"' | head -1 | tr -d '"'); if [ -z "$AAD" ]; then echo "$B: no AAD id found"; continue; fi; INFO=$(az ad user show --id $AAD --query '{name: displayName, surname: surname, given: givenName}' -o json 2>/dev/null); echo "$B: $INFO"; done
